Venue Info
Media Gallery
Azura Amphitheater
Bonner Springs, KS
Previous Names:
Sandstone Amphitheatre (Changed after 2000)
Verizon Wireless Amphitheater Kansas City (Changed after 2007)
Sandstone Amphitheatre (Changed after 2008)
Capitol Federal Park at Sandstone (Changed after 2012)
Cricket Wireless Amphitheater (Changed after 2015)
Providence Medical Center Amphitheater (Changed after 2021)
Seating Capacity: 18000
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 12
  DMB  (12)

Longest Performance:
09.20.00 - #41 (25:32)
Venue Picture
Description
Verizon Wireless Amphitheatre's capacity is 11,338 in the lawn, 3,269 in upper reserved seats, and 3,390 in lower reserved seats. This venue is one of the few amphitheatres with no cover for the reserved seats.
